diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: Types (Env, Hono, H, MiddlewareHandler)
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper providing createApp and createHandlers methods with generic support for multiple handlers
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context, GET_MATCH_RESULT, RouterRoute
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper to inspect matched routes and path information within handlers
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: Context, MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper with event-based handler and WSContext class
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: Cookie, CookieOptions, parse, serialize, parseSigned, serializeSigned
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading, writing, and deleting cookies with signed support
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: hc, Client, Hono, ExecutionContext, Schema, ClientRequestOptions
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context, src/hono
+- Safe summary: Testing client generator that wraps app with HTTP client interface
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: Runtime, Context, globalThis
+- Neighbor files: src/context
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper returning environment bindings based on platform
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: HtmlEscapedCallback, HtmlEscapedString, DOM_RENDERER, createCssJsxDomObjects, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper with class names, animations, and view transitions for SSR/CSR
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify
+- Reads as: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, CssClassName, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
+- Safe summary: Shared CSS utility functions for building class names, styles, and keyframes
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: RequestInit, Request, Response, Hop-by-hop headers
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper with header filtering and RFC compliance options
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Hono, Env, RouterRoute, getColorEnabled, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper to inspect and display route information with optional color output
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString, HtmlEscapedString
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML templating helper with automatic escaping and callback support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/middleware
+- Safe summary: SSG helper providing middleware for static site generation control
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, defaultExtensionMap, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks, ToSSGInterface
+- Reads as: Hono, Env, SSGParams, SSGContext, FileSystemModule, ToSSGResult
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg/plugins, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/client/utils
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation for fetching routes, generating content, and saving files
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: Hono, Env, RouterRoute, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware, METHOD_NAME_ALL
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/hono, src/router, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path manipulation and route filtering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: Context, Env, MiddlewareHandler, AddedSSGDataRequest, isDynamicRoute
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for detecting SS context, enabling/disabling SSG routes
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: SSEMessage
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports for stream, SSE, and text streaming responses
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, contextStash
+- Reads as: Context, TransformStream, StreamingApi
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
+- Safe summary: Base streaming response wrapper with error handling and context retention
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: Context, StreamingApi, TransformStream, isOldBunVersion
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html, src/utils/stream, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming helper with message formatting and headers
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports
